title: B Tech in Computer Science and Engineering - Galgotias
content: The School of Computing Science and Engineering introduces this program to provide high quality undergraduate education to the students with the objective of preparing them for prolific careers and providing graduate training in some focused area of Computer Science and Engineering. This School strives for excellence in producing graduates who will reinforce core computing areas while inventing and implementing new technology. The graduates will be able to apply sound judgment to the production, communal, ethical and professional issues of the rapidly developing computing industry. B. Tech or Bachelor of Technology is an undergraduate degree awarded to students who complete their engineering studies. It is a professional degree. It is an undergraduate course after which one can become an engineer in the field of Computer Science and Engineering. This course helps students in developing technical skills, analytical skills, and soft skills. Passed Diploma examination with at least 60% marks in any branch of Engineering and Technology. Or Passed B.Voc/3-year D.Voc. Stream in the same or allied sector. 01 Graduates of Computer Science and Engineering will be globally competent and provide sustainable solutions for interdisciplinary problems as team players 02 Graduates of Computer Science and Engineering will engage in professional activities with ethical practices in the field of Computer Science & Engineering to enhance their own stature to contribute society 03 Graduates of Computer Science and Engineering will acquire specialize knowledge in trending technologies for research, innovation and product development 01 02 Passed Diploma examination with at least 60% marks in any branch of Engineering and Technology. Or Passed B.Voc/3-year D.Voc. Stream in the same or allied sector.
